videos.headline: Highlight: Tory Blaylock outruns Temple in No. 13 Oklahoma beatdown
videos.description: Blaylock rushes for 100 yards on 14 attempts with two touchdowns while the Sooners' defense tacks on four sacks and an interception in the 42-3 blowout win over the Owls.

videos.headline: Jovantae Barnes takes it to the house for Oklahoma
videos.description: Jovantae Barnes strikes first for Oklahoma with a three-yard rushing touchdown vs. Temple.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jovantae Barnes takes it to the house for Oklahoma ) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tory Blaylock plows into the end zone for Sooners
videos.description: Tory Blaylock explodes into the end zone for a six-yard Oklahoma rushing touchdown vs. Temple.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tory Blaylock plows into the end zone for Sooners) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tory Blaylock rushes for another Oklahoma TD
videos.description: Tory Blaylock extends the Sooners' lead with his second rushing touchdown vs. the Owls.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play Analysis (Tory Blaylock rushes for another Oklahoma TD) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oklahoma makes no-look jump pass for 2-point conversion
videos.description: Jacob Ulrich scores an epic 2-point conversion for Oklahoma vs. Temple.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oklahoma makes no-look jump pass for 2-point conversion) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: John Mateer finds Xavier Robinson for an Oklahoma TD
videos.description: John Mateer connects with Xavier Robinson for an Oklahoma touchdown vs. Temple.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (John Mateer finds Xavier Robinson for an Oklahoma TD ) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oklahoma's R Mason Thomas ejected for targeting
videos.description: Oklahoma defensive lineman R Mason Thomas is ejected for high hit on Temple quarterback Evan Simon.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oklahoma's R Mason Thomas ejected for targeting) 2025/09/13 ESHEET

videos.headline: OU's John Mateer showers his teammates with praise after win
videos.description: Following the win over Temple, Mateer gives credit to the No. 13 Sooners' strong defense and true freshman RB Tory Blaylock then previews their approach to SEC play.
